titleStmt.title: SII 10.561: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 561. (A.R. No. 205 of 1905.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE DARK ROOM (CALLED CHĪKAṬI-MIDDI) IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MĀRKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Year missing.

summary.p: Incomplete. Gives the genealogy of the Reḍḍis down to Mācha, Vēma, Doḍḍa, Anna and Malla, sons of Kōmaṭi Prōla, the founder of the family, by Anyamāmbā, daughter of Doḍḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmadbālatamālakōmalaruci rlīlāvarāha ściraṁ pāyā dva ssa navēṁdukaṁdaḷarucā ya ssādaraṁ daṣṭrayā . Ādhattō dhṛtabhūrbhuvaḥ saharayōdaṁcatphaṇīṁdrāṁcitō gaṁḍābhōgagaḷatpayōdhisalilasyaṁdaḥ karīṁdra
śriyaḥ . tannābhīpaṁkajaṁmabhinnmadhurasāsvāda prasādōnmiṣa dvēdaḥ ṣaṭpadasāmagāna nukhinō dēvasya daityadviṣaḥ pādābjā dajani va ssucaritō varṇōsamaṁ gaṁgayā gāṁbhīryyādi mahatvavṛttijanakai statsa
maḥ . tasmā dvarnnapayōnidhē sumanasāmsankalpakalpadrumē vīraḥ kōmaṭiprōlaya ssa mudabhū dvaṁsasyakarttā kramāt . viśvaṁ raṁjayati tviṣāmiva nidhē ryyasyapra tāpātapa vyadyōtiṣṭa nadṛṣṭavairivanitākaṁṭhē haridrādyutiḥ .
siṁddhō śrīriva doḍḍayā dguṇanidhē jātānyamāṁbā vibhō stasyā sīt puruṣōttamasya daitā sāca kramēṇātmajān . sādhvīratna masūṁ mācanṛpatiṁ śrīvēmapṛdhvī patiṁ doḍḍakṣmābhuja maṁnnabhūmiramaṇaṁ śrīmallabhūvallabhaṁ . (incomplete )
Digital edition of SII 10.561 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
